entities.name: KRISHNA RIVER BASIN
entities.description: A large river basin in India that supplies water to many states and is subject to abiotic stress.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Krishna River Basin is located.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: A technique used for assessments of large river basins to monitor agriculture.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living stress factors affecting agriculture, specifically water scarcity in the Krishna basin.

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Moderate-Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer used for time series products to understand cropland changes.

entities.name: CROPLAND CHANGES
entities.description: Changes in agricultural land use and cover resulting from abiotic stresses.

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: A state of being short of water, acting as a primary abiotic stressor.

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to identify land use/land cover (LULC) areas from satellite imagery.

entities.name: LULC
entities.description: Land use/land cover classification used to categorize agricultural areas.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: A condition affecting crops, categorized into severe, moderate, and mild based on vegetation indices and damage.

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used to categorize water stress-affected crop areas.

entities.name: FIELD SAMPLING
entities.description: The process of collecting data on the ground to assess the intensity of crop damage.

entities.name: GROUND SURVEY DATA
entities.description: Data collected from the field used to assess the accuracy of MODIS-derived classifications.

entities.name: WATER INFLOWS
entities.description: The volume of water entering the Krishna river basin, used as an indicator of water availability.

entities.name: WATER OUTFLOWS
entities.description: The volume of water leaving the Krishna river basin, used as an indicator of water availability.

entities.name: TRMM
entities.description: Tropical Rainfall Monitoring Mission used to provide rainfall data for water stress analysis.

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural areas that rely solely on rainfall for water.

entities.name: IRRIGATED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural areas that use artificial irrigation systems for water.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water scarcity.

entities.name: ACCESS TO WATER
entities.description: The availability of water, which serves as a major driver for crop choice and input use.
